question: Does the first line on the right-side electronic display read exactly 'TODAY'S HOURS 7:00AM-9:30PM'?
Does the second line on the right-side electronic display read exactly 'PLEASE RESPECT ALL EQUIPMENT'?
In the schedule table, does the Wednesday cell for the 6:00-7:00 PM row now read 'Open'?
In the schedule table, does the Wednesday cell for the 7:00-8:00 PM row now read 'Class'?
Does the rules text now state 'Auto-cancel after 5 min late'?
Does the text on the electronic display retain a black-and-white pixelated/bitmap font aesthetic?
Is the text on the electronic display horizontally aligned correctly without tilting or waviness?
Are the gridlines in the schedule table straight and intact around the edited Wednesday cells?
Is the text in the edited Wednesday cells properly centered within the cells?
Does the rules paragraph wrap naturally within its original layout area without overflowing?
Is the orange sticky note with 'Lockers require quarters' completely unchanged?
Is the blue header 'COURT RESERVATION INFO' unchanged?
Are the unedited schedule cells (e.g., Thursday and Friday columns) unchanged?
Is the Front Desk phone number '(555) 867-5309' unchanged?

Are the edited areas free from obvious blurring, smudging, or digital artifacts?
